item.description: Draymond Green didn’t hold back when exposing his newest teammate on his podcast “The Draymond Green Show” on Tuesday. Yaxel Lendeborg said he didn’t hear from Green, after being selected as the No.11 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, Green publicly called him out on his podcast, “The Draymond Green Show,” and called him a “F— liar,” and went on to say, “It’s the Michigan way, of course it’s the Michigan way.”

item.title: Keon Ellis heads to Brooklyn
item.description: Shams Charania: Free agent guard Keon Ellis has agreed to a two-year, $18 million guaranteed deal with the Brooklyn Nets, sources tell ESPN.

item.title: Contains a full mutual option that fully guarantees …
item.description: Shams Charania: The deal, negotiated by Mark Bartelstein and Torrian Jones of @PrioritySports , contains a full mutual option that fully guarantees the $18M for Ellis while allowing both sides to have a conversation about a new deal next summer, but either party can opt-in (not opt-out).

item.title: "The key word here however they want to code it, is …
item.description: Heat Central: Brian Windhorst on LeBron saying he wants to be happy on his next team: "The key word here however they want to code it, is he's not going to ask for every last dollar... That is the most important thing here beyond analyzing his day to day life. I think happiness is where he could play golf 365 as far as i'm concerned"

item.title: That means that Porzingis is immediately …
item.description: Keith Smith: Note on Kristaps Porzingis' new contract with the Warriors: This is an extension (and it's already official) vs a new deal. The deal also didn't include greater than a 5% raise from Year 1 to Year 2. That means that Porzingis is immediately trade-eligible. No restrictions.

item.title: Kristaps Porzingis' deal with Warriors is an extension
item.description: Marc Stein: And: The more crucial factor, per a league source, is that Kristaps Porziņģis and the Warriors have done this deal as an extension rather than a Bird Rights contract.

item.title: NBA is not predicting aggressive growth from 2026-27 …
item.description: Eric Pincus: The NBA is not predicting aggressive growth from 2026-27 to 2027-28 - the cap just climbed 6.669%; the next projection is only 5.479% to $174M

item.title: Kawhi Leonard was not interested in Minnesota and Detroit when they attempted to trade for him
item.description: APHoops: The Minnesota Timberwolves and Detroit Pistons were amongst the multiple teams attempting to trade for Kawhi Leonard before they were rebuffed by Leonard’s camp, per @ShamsCharania.

item.title: Warriors, I'm told, were able to officially announce …
item.description: Marc Stein: The Warriors, I'm told, were able to officially announce Kristaps Porziņģis' new contract because -- while the start of NBA free agency is now 6 PM ET -- its annual moratorium on completing official roster business won't begin until after midnight. The moratorium runs July 1-6.

item.title: Luke Kennard signs with Phoenix
item.description: Shams Charania: Free agent sharpshooter Luke Kennard has agreed to a two-year, $13 million deal with the Phoenix Suns, with a player option for the second season, sources tell ESPN.

item.title: Jalen Duren interested in Boston
item.description: Tomek Kordylewski: Here's @JakeLFischer during the B/R free agency LIVE: "I know Jalen Duren's side has some interest in the potential sign-and-trade exit not to L.A., not to Sacramento, but to Boston."

item.title: The growing anticipation leaguewide is that the Lakers …
item.description: Marc Stein: The growing anticipation leaguewide is that the Lakers ultimately secure commitments on new contracts from Toronto free agent Sandro Mamukelashvili and Philadelphia free agent Quentin Grimes while still pursuing their top summer target: Utah restricted free agent Walker Kessler.

item.title: Jaylen Brown is out there,”
item.description: ESPN Cleveland: “James Harden opted out yesterday. He from what I understand is willing to partner with the Cavs to try and figure out how to improve their roster. Jaylen Brown is out there,” - @WindhorstESPN on the Cavs

item.title: "It's an opportunity for him to explore his game a …
item.description: The Spurs also want Bryant to spread his wings offensively this summer. Williamson said the 14th overall pick of the 2025 NBA Draft will only see action in Las Vegas, where the Spurs will play at least five games after kicking off the summer circuit with three games at the California Classic in San Francisco. It all begins against the Miami Heat at 7 p.m. Friday at Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. "It's an opportunity for him to explore his game a little bit without having to wor

item.title: "I was supposed to coach Summer League last year in …
item.description: Williams said he's "pretty excited" about serving as a Summer League coach for the first time in his career. "It seemed like every time I had the opportunity to be a head coach for Summer League I either took another job or unfortunately early in my career (staffs he was a part of) got fired in a couple of situations," he said. "I was supposed to coach Summer League last year in Minnesota, but I was able to come here, so I'm definitely excited about this chance."

item.title: Max Christie and Naji Marshall are changing their …
item.description: Mike Curtis: Max Christie and Naji Marshall are changing their jersey numbers, per a #Mavs spokesperson: Christie will switch from No. 00 to No. 0, previously worn by Dante Exum in 2025-26. Marshall is changing his number from No. 13 to No. 3, previously worn by Anthony Davis in 2025-26.

item.title: Fischer: Lakers expected to get Sandro Mamukelashvili, Quentin Grimes
item.description: NBACentral: The Lakers are expected to land Sandro Mamukelashvili and Quentin Grimes, per @JakeLFischer "The whole league is operating as if Mamu and Quentin Grimes are done there" (h/t @hmfaigen )

item.title: Erik Spoelstra and LeBron James really bonded during …
item.description: Heat Central: Erik Spoelstra and LeBron James really bonded during their time together on team USA in 2024, per @WindhorstESPN "We should point out the team USA connections to the Miami Heat. Bam Adebayo was a huge part of the 2024 USA squad. Erik Spoelstra and LeBron really bonded during that summer.... Erik Spoelstra was LeBron's personal workout guy during that 6 weeks over the summer. Soon as the court opened before the game, the first 2 people on the court were Spoelstra and LeBron. I think

item.title: I LOVE ROBERT WILLIAMS
item.description: Toumani Buckets: I LOVE ROBERT WILLIAMS

item.title: This signing offsets the $30 million in luxury tax …
item.description: Yossi Gozlan: The Suns can sign Luke Kennard to two years, $12.4 million with the taxpayer mid-level exception. They can give him this with the non-tax mid-level if they get under the first apron. This signing offsets the $30 million in luxury tax savings from the Miles Bridges trade.

item.title: Group Play games in the Emirates NBA Cup 2026 will …
item.description: NBA Communications: Group Play games in the Emirates NBA Cup 2026 will take place on "Cup Nights" from Oct. 30 – Nov. 27. Each team will play one game against each of the four opponents in its group. The six group winners and one wild card from each conference will advance to the single-elimination Knockout Rounds. The game and broadcast schedules for Group Play will be announced in August. The home/road teams for Group Play matchups are available below and here: pr.nba.com/wp-content/upl oads/s

item.title: Zach Collins signs two-year extension with Bulls
item.description: Shams Charania: Free agent center Zach Collins has agreed to a two-year, $17 million contract extension to stay with the Chicago Bulls, sources tell ESPN.

item.title: And the Bulls worked over the last few days to beat …
item.description: Shams Charania: Mark Bartelstein of @PrioritySports and the Bulls worked over the last few days to beat the 11:59 pm ET deadline tonight to complete the deal as an extension and keep Collins off the free agency market.

item.title: They should still maintain $32 million in cap space
item.description: Yossi Gozlan: The Bulls can give Zach Collins this contract with their $9.4 million room mid-level. They should still maintain $32 million in cap space.
